description_long: This is a small, cylindrical ceramic cup with a rounded handle attached to one side. The exterior is primarily white with a black gradient at the base, and it features a whimsical design: one side displays a stylized black cat with yellow eyes, set against a crescent moon and three stars, while the other side has the name 'Sabrina' written in a playful script above a purple star. The cup's surface appears smooth and glossy, reflecting light subtly. The interior is plain and matches the exterior's white color. The cup is compact, likely intended for hot beverages such as coffee or tea, and its sturdy handle allows for easy gripping.
description: A small, white ceramic cup with a black cat and moon motif on one side and 'Sabrina' written on the other, featuring a smooth, glossy finish and a rounded handle.
description_view_0: Front view showing the black cat, crescent moon, and stars motif on a white background with a black gradient at the base.
description_view_1: Side view with the handle out of sight, showing the edge of the 'Sabrina' text starting to appear.
description_view_2: Back view displaying the full 'Sabrina' script and a purple star, with the handle visible on the right.
description_view_3: Side view focused on the handle, with only a small portion of the text visible.
